title: justicia latiflora
intro: Justicia latiflora, also known as the Wild Quinine or Justicia, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to inhibit the growth of certain pathogens. The health benefits of Justicia latiflora include its potential to alleviate symptoms of malaria, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Justicia latiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
